_comment: Build-time plugin exclusion config. Copy this file to `manifest-plugins.config.json` (without the `_comment` field) and edit the boolean values. Default: all plugins enabled. If `manifest-plugins.config.json` is absent, the build emits all plugins. Plugin keys are the `id` field of each plugin's metadata (e.g. 'anthropic-models-fix'), NOT the TypeScript class name. The 'anthropic-models-fix' plugin is disabled by default because upstream Manifest now fetches Anthropic models live from https://api.anthropic.com/v1/models via provider-model-fetcher.service.ts, so the static-catalog workaround this plugin implemented is no longer needed. Re-enable it only if upstream regresses and the live fetch falls behind on Anthropic catalog changes.

plugins.<plugin-id>: boolean (true to include, false to exclude)
